pi_items.source: Task setup script and install script verify it downloads from the official OpenRocket examples repository.
Explicitly defined in setup_task.sh and export_result.sh.

Task description specifically states outer diameter must be 'between 8mm and 12mm'.
Task description specifically states outer diameter must be 'between 8mm and 12mm'.
Task description specifically states length must be 'between 10mm and 20mm'.
Task description specifically states length must be 'between 10mm and 20mm'.
Task description explicitly requires separation of 'at least 300mm (0.3m)'.
Verifier script requires a score of >= 70 points to pass.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a real, official OpenRocket example file 'dual_parachute_deployment.ork'. It requires the creation of two radially-aligned launch lugs with specific physical constraints (OD 8-12mm, length 10-20mm, spacing >= 0.3m) and outputting an updated ORK and a PDF containing the fin marking guides and templates. All dimensional and positional expectations explicitly align with the task description, and are properly validated by the evaluation logic (using soft tolerances).
